subcodes.first_line: O thou faithful servant of God! Jinab-i-Aqa Muhammad Isma'il is present and offereth the highest praise of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق الهی جناب آقا محمد اسمعیل حاضر و نهایت ستایش را از شما مینماید
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
